metadata.description: L2 components SSOT built from plane runtime pattern + location/plane-status contract. Runtime field name planner_status is kept for compatibility; semantics are plane status.
metadata.scope: L2 components only (group_by>2). Specific group_by is selected by simulation parameter; aggregate domain is group_by>2; no L2->L1 feedback.
metadata.source: plane transitions parity + approved MultiBOM location rules

architecture: L2 components (plane parity + strict location/plane status gates, no inactive, no reserve in contract)

runtime_compatibility.note: Runtime model may keep internal state=5 for technical queue/compatibility, but state=5 is excluded from contract matrix and allowed transition rules.

invariant_principles.claim: No L2->L1 feedback: components contour never modifies plane state/triggers.
No inactive for components: state=1 is forbidden.
No reserve for components in L2 contract matrix.
Location cannot change while plane is in ops or in final repair stage (ActiveTrigger=1), except forced terminal detach.
Day0 load contract: heli_pandas.status_id is loaded 1:1 into model pre_state_id for group_by > 2; transition logic applies only after day0 snapshot.

location_contract.rule: If plane is in ops (planner_status==2) OR in final repair stage (planner_status==4 AND planner_active_trigger==1), location changes are forbidden.
location_contract.exception: Forced detach is allowed only when (ll > 0 AND sne_next >= ll) OR (br > 0 AND ppr_next >= br).

location_contract.rule: On plane enter to repair, all components on this plane must set aircraft_number=0.
When plane enters ops or ActiveTrigger=1, enforce full kit through quota demand and assignment.
Plane enter ops => installed components move to state=2; plane exit ops => installed components move from state=2 to state=3.
State=7 is allowed on-wing (aircraft_number != 0) as non-removable holding while location is locked.

rtc_execution_order.notes: Snapshot plane status (planner_status/active_trigger/assembly_trigger) for current day.
Apply location guards based on plane status snapshot.
Quota demand stage: assembly-trigger and full-kit demand routing.
Quota apply stage: entries to state=2 for serviceable components; plane-status-driven exit 2->3.
Quota apply stage: entries to state=2 for unserviceable components.
Optional spawn (0->2/0->3) applied outside runtime matrix if enabled.
Postprocess-only: telemetry + repair exit (4->3) handled outside runtime matrix.

rules.notes: Planned birth 0->3 (contract placeholder). Disabled until planned-birth source data is integrated.
Dynamic spawn is allowed any day to close deficit (quota-driven).
Plane exits ops -> installed components move to serviceable.

pre.expr: group_by > 2 AND (oh > 0 AND ppr_next >= oh) AND NOT ((ll > 0 AND sne_next >= ll) OR (br > 0 AND ppr_next >= br))

rules.notes: Resource limit reached without terminal detach: component stays on-wing in unserviceable.

pre.expr: group_by > 2 AND ((ll > 0 AND sne_next >= ll) OR (br > 0 AND ppr_next >= br))

rules.notes: Installed serviceable components join ops on quota apply when demand exists.

pre.expr: group_by > 2 AND aircraft_number != 0 AND intent_state == 2 AND engine_quota_demand > 0

rules.notes: Return from on-wing unserviceable to operations on quota apply when demand exists.
